payload.name: cal-add
payload.description: Add a calendar event. Usage: cal-add <YYYY-MM-DD> <HH:MM> <title...>. Generate a short unique event_id like evt-XXXX (4 random hex chars). Emit calendar.event.added with all fields.

fields.event_id: string — short unique id like evt-XXXX
fields.title: string — event title

payload.name: cal-edit
payload.description: Edit a calendar event. Usage: cal-edit <event_id> [field=value ...]. Supported fields: date=YYYY-MM-DD, time=HH:MM, title=text. Only emit fields that are provided. The projector merges the edit onto the existing state.

params.event_id: string — id of event to edit
params.fields: key=value pairs to update (date, time, title)

payload.name: cal-del
payload.description: Delete a calendar event. Usage: cal-del <event_id>. Emit calendar.event.deleted with the event_id.

params.event_id: string — id of event to delete

fields.event_id: string — id of event being deleted

payload.name: calendar
payload.description: Render a full month calendar HTML page for the current month (use datetime to determine year/month dynamically). Build event state from the event stream: calendar.event.added creates entries keyed by event_id, calendar.event.edited patches fields on matching event_id (only non-null fields apply), calendar.event.deleted removes the event_id. Render a 7-column grid Mon-Sun with enough rows for all days. Each day cell shows the day number and that day's events sorted by time (time + title). Show the event_id in small grey text beside each event for reference when editing/deleting. Use clean inline CSS: bordered cells, adequate padding, weekend days lightly shaded, today highlighted. Include a header with month name and year. Events outside the current month are listed below the grid in a separate section.
